payload.author: agent
payload.body: Deferred as a stretch follow-up. The epic's acceptance (git-pull divergent changes → identical uncorrupted board, no SQLite shared) is met and tested by SCP-112 without this. LAN peer gossip (mDNS discovery + anti-entropy push over mTLS) is a sizable networking feature; the hub already provides LAN real-time today. Recommend tackling as its own focused effort.
